violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Dining tables noted in need of more routine cleaning. Lower backside of meat display cooler noted in need of cleaning.
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mops noted in utilty sink need air-dry.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Disposable towel dispenser noted empty at back handsink.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food containers and water bottle not properly labeled.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls inside walkin cooler noted in need of cleaning.
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mops noted in utiliity sink.
